site.name: OpenAI-Hub
site.title: OpenAI-Hub - Reliable and transparent AI API gateway
site.description: Access OpenAI and multiple AI model APIs without a proxy. Transparent billing with 4-decimal precision, high concurrency support, privacy-first design, and Tencent Cloud ECDN acceleration.

hero.title: Access OpenAI and multi-model APIs without a proxy
hero.subtitle: OpenAI-Hub delivers a stable, transparent, and scalable AI API experience. Built for production with high-concurrency routing, Tencent Cloud ECDN acceleration, and privacy-first architecture.
hero.cardBody: A unified access layer, account pool, load balancing, transparent billing, and no-data-retention principles for modern AI products.

features.title: Core features
features.subtitle: A modern AI API experience for developers, teams, and businesses.

items.title: Direct access without a proxy
items.description: Reach OpenAI APIs through OpenAI-Hub directly, reducing network complexity and speeding up integration.

items.title: Transparent billing
items.description: View and charge usage with precision down to four decimal places so every API call is easy to audit.

items.title: API aggregation
items.description: Integrate multiple AI model providers through a unified interface and reduce vendor-switching overhead.

items.title: High concurrency support
items.description: Built with account pools and load balancing to maintain throughput and availability during peak traffic.

items.title: Privacy and security
items.description: No user data retention by default, helping reduce exposure risks for sensitive business workflows.

items.title: ECDN acceleration
items.description: Powered by Tencent Cloud ECDN to improve request routing and deliver a faster end-user experience.

pricing.title: Transparent billing
pricing.subtitle: Every request is measurable and visible, ideal for operational clarity and enterprise cost control.
points: Clear call-level cost visibility for budgeting
Unified billing view to simplify reconciliation

security.title: Privacy-first and delivery-focused
security.subtitle: From data handling to network acceleration, built to support production workloads with confidence.
points: No retention of user requests or business data by default
Routing and stability safeguards for high-concurrency traffic
Faster access with Tencent Cloud ECDN acceleration

items.question: What use cases is OpenAI-Hub built for?
items.answer: It is suitable for developers, SaaS products, internal enterprise tools, and high-concurrency services that need fast access to OpenAI or multiple AI model APIs.

items.question: Why emphasize transparent billing?
items.answer: Transparent billing helps teams understand usage costs accurately, optimize product strategy, and reduce reconciliation uncertainty.

items.question: How is data privacy handled?
items.answer: The platform follows a no-data-retention principle to reduce the risks associated with storing sensitive information.

footer.tagline: Reliable, transparent, and scalable AI API aggregation
